diff --git a/sim_notes.md b/sim_notes.md
index cb381e6..b5ce4b6 100644
--- a/sim_notes.md
+++ b/sim_notes.md
@@ -120,2 +120,8 @@ Week 18 / day 119 observations:
 - Open issues still rose to 508 despite S2-focused ops. Keep total ops flat for now because runway is still thin; public messaging should focus on quota visibility, the dominant social complaint.
 - Week 18 action: hold all operating config, repeat $9 E3 rescue offers, and post about clearer quota visibility/early warnings.
+
+Week 19 / day 126 observations:
+- Cash rose to $52.3k on another strong billing window, but cancellations jumped to 49. Most churn was low-ARPA S2 A/B, while upgrades into C were strong enough to lift MRR to about $190k.
+- Open issues fell from 508 to 465, so the S2-targeted support allocation may finally be helping, although many aged tickets remain extremely old.
+- Next billing window is weaker, roughly $36k against weekly costs around $47k, so do not spend the new cushion. Hold prices, quotas, tier 3 capacity, C tier 4, no ads/dev, and $2.5k/day total ops with S2 targeting.
+- Repeated $9 E3 rescue offers again. These leads are effectively optional upside after many non-converting turns.
